# ArenaMind Interactive Systems

ArenaMind is a next-generation smart stadium platform designed to optimize crowd flow, enhance fan accessibility, and promote sustainable transit for large-scale events.

## Features
- Interactive Spatial Wayfinding
- Telemetry & Staff Operations
- Accessible Routing

## Links
- [Wayfinding Portal](/fan/wayfinding)
- [Staff Operations](/staff/telemetry)
- [Documentation](/docs)
